channel.title: HFaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from HFaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bettor Converts $30 Parlay Into Nearly $2 Million at Florida Sportsbook
item.description: A recreational bettor landed one of the largest parlay payouts in Hard Rock Casino Florida's history, illustrating why sportsbooks remain open to such wagers.

item.title: Ray Dalio Recommends Up to 15% Gold Allocation Amid Iran War Uncertainty
item.description: Investor Ray Dalio cited geopolitical instability and a shift away from dollar-based transactions as reasons to hold a larger share of assets in gold.

item.title: Reformulated Hair-Loss Drug Shows Strong Regrowth Results in Trial
item.description: An updated formulation of a widely used hair-loss treatment demonstrated robust hair regrowth and an improved safety profile in a recent clinical trial.

item.title: SEC Pushes Semiannual Reporting, but Major Companies Show Quarterly Model Works
item.description: The SEC is exploring less frequent earnings disclosures, but performance among leading public companies suggests investors are not locked into short-term thinking.
